name: @brain/evidence-gateway
description: Dormant AI Brain Evidence Gateway: the write-side composition root defining the deterministic ingestion pipeline (receive → validate → normalize → deduplicate → prepare confidence/memory/audit/exposure). Pure placeholder stages; no work, no persistence. The normalize stage's plan() wires (still dormant) to @brain/evidence-normalization to produce a deferred ApplicationPlan (M55). Depends only on @brain/evidence-contracts + @brain/evidence-store + @brain/evidence-normalization.
